message:
perf(bocpd): Optimize Bayesian Online Changepoint Detection

Refines the BOCPD (Bayesian Online Changepoint Detection) inference
implementation with:
- Optimized computation paths for better performance
- New bocpd_opt_test.rs for validating optimization correctness

These changes improve the changepoint detection algorithm used for
process triage without altering the statistical properties.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
